about_me

About Me

I'm a Software Engineering student pursuing my Higher Diploma in Computing & Software Engineering at ICBT Campus, Batticaloa, affiliated with Cardiff Metropolitan University.

My focus is on full-stack web development and mobile application development, with hands-on experience building real projects in teams — from a PHP MVC travel booking platform to an Android printing service app with a PHP/MySQL backend.

I enjoy solving practical problems with clean, well-structured code, and I'm always looking to grow my skills in database design, OOP, and the full software development lifecycle.

Web Application · Team of 4

GlobeTrek Adventures

Travel Booking Web App

A full-stack travel booking platform built with PHP MVC and MySQL, featuring user authentication, booking management, and an admin dashboard.

  • Admin dashboard for trip oversight
  • Responsive UI with custom animations

PrintExpress

Mobile Printing App

An Android app for document upload, print ordering, and real-time order tracking, backed by a PHP REST API connected to MySQL.

  • Real-time order tracking
  • PHP REST backend with MySQL
  • Clean UI/UX for a seamless mobile experience
